meta.title: Enesi's Space — Full-stack developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Jedidiah Onotu — full-stack developer building fast, accessible web products.

hero.name: Jedidiah Onotu
hero.footerNote: This portfolio is a work in progress — more case studies and visuals coming soon. Made with care and late-night commits 🌙
hero.disclaimer: Projects and brands shown are for portfolio demonstration only and do not imply ongoing affiliation unless stated.
hero.bio: BSc Information Technology @ Middlesex University — graduating soon. I design and build web applications end to end: APIs, databases, and interfaces that are fast, accessible, and maintainable.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm an undergraduate Information Technology student at Middlesex University, based in London, United Kingdom, and I'm approaching graduation. I work across the stack—frontend, backend, and databases—to ship reliable, well-designed products.
I build with modern tools like React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node, and I care about performance, security, and clear user experiences from API to interface.
I enjoy turning briefs and ideas into working software, learning new tools as the stack evolves, and collaborating on projects that are useful in the real world.

focus.title: Final year & wrap-up
focus.body: Finishing my BSc IT degree at Middlesex, strengthening full-stack project work, and preparing for the next step after graduation.

focus.title: London, UK
focus.body: Open to full-stack and software roles where I can keep building products end to end and grow with a strong team.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: From database to deployment — I help turn ideas into reliable full-stack products

items.title: Full-stack web applications
items.body: End-to-end builds: REST or serverless APIs, data persistence, auth, and polished front ends with React/Next.js.

items.title: Front-end & UI
items.body: Responsive, accessible interfaces with strong UX, component-driven structure, and modern styling.

items.title: Back-end & integrations
items.body: Server logic, third-party APIs, webhooks, and production-minded error handling and security.

items.title: Performance & quality
items.body: Faster pages, lean bundles, and maintainable code so features stay shippable as products grow.

projects.sectionSubtitle: Deep dive into some of my recent projects and their impact

items.title: Enesi's Space (portfolio)
items.description: Show experience, services, and projects in one fast, accessible site that deploys easily.
items.role: Solo: Next.js App Router, styling, and content.
items.outcome: A living portfolio that matches my current role: full-stack developer in London, finishing a BSc in IT at Middlesex.

items.title: REST API + dashboard
items.description: A CRUD app with a documented API, persisted data, and a client dashboard for managing records securely.
items.role: Back end: routes, validation, and data layer. Front end: auth flows, tables, and responsive layout.
items.outcome: Replace this card with your repo, demo link, and screenshot when ready.

items.title: Capstone / final-year build
items.description: Deliver a scoped IT system that maps to degree outcomes: requirements, build, test, and deployment story.
items.role: Full-stack ownership: architecture, implementation, and documentation for hand-in and demo.
items.outcome: Update with your actual module title, stack, and outcomes.

items.title: Integration & automation
items.description: Connect external providers (e-mail, storage, LLMs) with a small, observable service layer in production.
items.role: Wiring APIs, environment-based config, and error handling; optional UI for operators.
items.outcome: Swap in a real case study and a link to the live or repo.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Great Together
contact.sub: Got a project in mind? Reach out—I'd love to hear from you.
contact.locationLine: Available remotely · Based in London, UK
